column1:
GEMS PROFESSIONAL FEES TARIFFS FOR ORTHOTICS & PROSTHETICS
WITH EFFECT FROM 2026-01-01

Disclaimer: 
1. All Orthotic and Prosthetic tariff codes, NAPPI codes, and tariff rates are subject to Scheme rules, benefits, protocols, policies, and member/beneficiary available limits and sub-limits.
2. Pre- authorization and provider referral will be subject to a threshold, and this may include other codes as per the flag column where the Scheme deems necessary.
